---
title: About
comments: false
toc: false
---

## Why this blog exists

Tea Tasting Statisticians was inspired by Fisher's classic "Lady Tasting Tea" story, where a simple claim was tested through careful experimental design.
We use that same mindset for modern clinical and regulatory questions: clear assumptions, explicit evidence logic, and practical decisions.

## Who we are

### Tea Tasting Lady

- Senior biostatistician with 10+ years in regulatory science
- 7 years at MFDS (Korea Ministry of Food and Drug Safety)
- 5 years in industry experience (including MedTech)
- Focus: regulatory review logic, study design adequacy, and evidence communication

LinkedIn: [https://www.linkedin.com/in/systat/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/systat/)

### Tea Tasting Gentleman

- Biostatistician and PhD candidate in Clinical Epidemiology
- Focus: diabetes, continuous glucose monitoring, claims data, RWE, and innovative trial design
- Interest: translating complex methods into operational guidance

LinkedIn: [https://www.linkedin.com/in/shstat1729/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shstat1729/)

## What you will find here

- FDA/MFDS/ICH guidance interpretation posts
- Clinical trial design notes for non-statisticians
- Real-world evidence and causal inference explainers
- Medical AI evaluation and reporting topics

If you are from clinical affairs, medical affairs, RA/QA, or product teams, this site is designed to help you make better decisions without requiring a statistics degree.

## Contact and support

- Email: `shstat1729@gmail.com`
- Email: `systat1729@gmail.com`
- KakaoPay support: [https://qr.kakaopay.com/Ej7oNwc6S](https://qr.kakaopay.com/Ej7oNwc6S)

![Buy Me a Tea](/img/QR_code_buy_me_a_tea.jpeg)
